A dynamic checkpoint is a checkpoint that can check for any value generated at run time
A function that encapsulates an activity into a keyword
A graphical representation of the result in an expandable tree, organized according to the actions and the Web pages visited during the test run

Base Filter properties is the most fundamental properties of a particular test object class.
Benefits of Automated Testing where you can build a suite of tests that covers every feature in your Web site or application.

Enables you to select any local function defined directly in the current action or function library
Enables you to track application performance counters during a run session These counters enable you to monitor the resources used by your application
Enables you to view the properties of a checkpoint object, the same way as you do in the relevant Checkpoint Properties dialog box.
Enables you to view the properties of a checkpoints object, the same way as you do in the relevant Checkpoint Properties dialog box
Enables you to view the properties of an output value object, the same way as you do in the relevant Checkpoint Properties dialog box
